description: Your organization is consolidating legacy application logs to a single UDP port. Configure Splunk to listen on UDP port 5140 and route incoming data to the 'system_logs' index with a default sourcetype of 'legacy_app'. Implement index-time routing rules in /opt/splunk/etc/system/local/ using inputs.conf, props.conf, and transforms.conf to override the sourcetype based on payload content: logs containing the exact string '[CRITICAL]' must be assigned the sourcetype 'legacy_app_critical', and logs containing '[WARN]' must be assigned 'legacy_app_warn'. Splunk is installed at /opt/splunk. The Splunk web interface is available at http://localhost:8000 (admin / SplunkAdmin1!).
